messages.content: How do I reset my password?

To reset your password, please follow these steps:

1. Go to https://account.microsoft.com/security - This will take you to the Microsoft account security page where you can manage your password.
2. Click "Change password" - This option will allow you to update your current password.
3. Enter your current password - You need to enter your current password to verify your identity.
4. Create a new strong password (minimum 12 characters) - Your new password should be at least 12 characters long and include a mix of uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, and symbols.
5. Include: uppercase, lowercase, numbers, symbols - Make sure your new password meets the password requirements for complexity.
6. Click "Save" - Once you've entered your new password, click "Save" to update it.
7. You'll need to re-login to all devices - After changing your password, you'll need to sign in again on all devices where you use your Microsoft account.

If you've forgotten your password, you can also use the "Can't access your account?" option on the login page to recover your account.

Did this resolve your issue?

follow_up_questions: Did you enter correct current password?
